briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Consider Imperial Oil Petition — Details Redacted
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to consider a petition (a formal written request) submitted by Imperial Oil, covering agenda pages 221–302. The full contents are redacted, so the specific ask or proposal is not publicly known at this time.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision and check for an unredacted version to understand how this may affect your business.
briefs.industries: Natural Resources, Transportation & Logistics, Construction & Development
